_meta.comment: 履歷唯一真實來源 (single source of truth)。改這裡 → 跑 node resume/generate.mjs 重生所有產物。標 TODO 的欄位請你補/確認。

headline.zh: Product Builder｜產品經理 × 全端開發 × 設計
headline.en: Product Builder — Product Manager × Full-Stack × Design

summary.zh: Product Builder，橫跨產品管理、UI/UX 與全端開發，擅長把 AI 概念快速落地為可用產品、對成效負責、在模糊中拆解問題。上任首 30 天內獨立交付 2 個 AI 產品 MVP；以唯一 PM 主導 3 人團隊將投資 App 0→1 上架雙平台，創造 300 萬營收、1,000 週活，並以規格驅動開發（SDD）結合 AI prototype 將需求到交付壓縮至 2 週、沉澱為公司 AI 開發 SOP。具影視背景，能用 FFmpeg 打造後端影音處理流程，結合敘事與技術實作。
summary.en: Product Builder operating at the intersection of product management, UI/UX, and full-stack development, turning AI concepts into shipped products and owning measurable outcomes. Delivered two AI-product MVPs solo within my first 30 days; as the sole PM leading a 3-person team, shipped an investment app 0→1 on iOS/Android, driving NT$3M revenue and 1,000 WAU, and introduced spec-driven development with AI prototyping to compress requirements-to-delivery to 2 weeks, codified as the company's AI development SOP. A filmmaking background lets me build FFmpeg-based media pipelines, merging storytelling with technical execution.

zh: 產品策略與範疇定義
PRD / 需求規格與拆解
使用者故事與 MVP 優先排序
競品與市場分析
成效指標 / 北極星指標、A-B 測試
規格驅動開發 (SDD)
使用者研究與易用性測試
跨團隊協作 (Jira / Notion / Confluence)
AI prototype 流程
Gemini
Cursor
AI 開發 SOP 設計
React
Next.js
TypeScript
TailwindCSS
Redux
TanStack Query
i18n
GSAP
SEO

Photoshop
Illustrator
UI/UX
資訊架構
Supabase

RESTful API
Playwright (E2E)
端到端產品負責：橫跨產品管理、UI/UX 設計與全端開發，將 AI 概念快速落地為可用產品。
上任首 30 天內獨立交付 2 個 AI 產品 MVP，從資料庫 schema 設計到前端實作一手包辦。
以唯一 PM 主導 3 人團隊將投資理財 App 0→1 上架 iOS / Android，創造 300 萬元營收、1,000 週活；導入 SDD（規格驅動）＋ AI prototype，將需求到交付壓縮至 2 週，後沉澱為公司 AI 開發 SOP。
獨立 1 天交付金融商品行銷網頁（Landing Page），達 55% 轉換、2,000 報名、SEO 關鍵字第一；主導理財內容導購網站將購物車轉換率自 22% 提升至 57%（+159%）。
運用 FFmpeg 打造後端影音處理流程（自動燒錄字幕、轉碼），結合影視背景與技術實作。
技術棧：React / Vue、Supabase、多種生成式 AI API（影片 / 語音），打造可擴展、以使用者為中心的 AI 工具；透過快速內部測試與即時回饋迭代，銜接技術可行性與商業目標。
en: End-to-end product ownership across product management, UI/UX, and full-stack development—turning AI concepts into shipped products.
Architected and delivered two AI-product MVPs solo within the first 30 days, from database schema design to front-end implementation.

As the sole PM leading a 3-person team, shipped an investment app 0→1 on iOS / Android (NT$3M revenue, 1,000 WAU); introduced spec-driven development with AI prototyping to compress requirements-to-delivery to 2 weeks, later codified as the company's AI development SOP.
Delivered a financial-product landing page solo in 1 day (55% conversion, 2,000 sign-ups, #1 SEO); lifted a finance-content commerce site's cart conversion from 22% to 57% (+159%).
Built FFmpeg-based backend video pipelines (automated subtitle burning, encoding), merging a filmmaking background with technical execution.

Stack: React / Vue, Supabase, and generative AI APIs (video / voice) to build scalable, user-centric AI tools; bridged technical feasibility and business goals through rapid internal testing and real-time iteration.

zh: 與產品團隊協作參與功能與產品宣傳企劃，將產品價值轉化為可被理解的內容。
主導小紅書、抖音等新平台的內容策略，以使用者行為數據迭代優化成效。
單支活動影片觀看數達 196.1K，較平台平均高出約 100K。
en: Partnered with the product team on feature and product-marketing planning, translating product value into accessible content.
Led content strategy on emerging platforms (RED, TikTok), iterating with user-behavior data.
A single campaign video reached 196.1K views, ~100K above the channel average.

zh: 主導專案規劃：產出含市場定位、競品分析、時程與預算的提案文件，回收 500+ 份使用者研究問卷建立受眾洞察。
提案協助團隊取得文化部劇本開發補助、文化部劇本首獎（120 萬）、公視孵育計畫等，累計 800 萬以上補助。
en: Owned project planning: produced proposals covering market positioning, competitive analysis, timeline, and budget; ran 500+ survey responses to build audience insight.
Pitches won Ministry of Culture screenplay grants, the Ministry's top screenplay prize (NT$1.2M), and a PTS incubation slot—over NT$8M in funding.

company.zh: 大學問 Knowhow College（百大 Podcast 頻道）

zh: 領導 5 人影音團隊，統籌 50+ 部影片製作專案，累計下載破 100 萬。
與行銷、企劃跨部門協作，建立內容生產 SOP 與品質標準，提升產製效率。
en: Led a 5-person video team across 50+ production projects, surpassing 1M downloads.
Partnered cross-functionally with marketing and planning to build content-production SOPs and quality standards, raising output efficiency.

zh: 為新創與影視品牌從 0 建立品牌識別系統與視覺規範，將品牌定位轉化為一致的體驗；主導多次提案競賽，入選大港設計提案複賽與中華設計獎。
影視作品多次入圍影展（藝美獎最佳導演／剪輯、世新二三影展最佳紀錄片等）。
en: Built brand identity systems and visual guidelines 0→1 for startups and film brands; led multiple pitch competitions, shortlisted in the Dagang Design and Chinese Design Awards.
Film work shortlisted at multiple festivals (Best Director / Editing at the Yimei Awards, Best Documentary at the Shih Hsin 2-3 Festival, etc.).

zh: 唯一 PM 主導 3 人團隊 0→1 上架雙平台，300 萬營收、1,000 週活；SDD + AI prototype 2 週交付，沉澱為公司 AI 開發 SOP。
en: Sole PM, 3-person team, 0→1 on iOS/Android; NT$3M revenue, 1,000 WAU; SDD + AI prototyping for 2-week delivery, codified as company AI SOP.

name.zh: 金融商品行銷網頁（Landing Page，1 天獨立交付）

zh: 1 天獨立 0→1 交付，55% 轉換率、2,000 報名；特定關鍵字 SEO 第一（高於官網）。
en: 1-day solo 0→1 delivery; 55% conversion, 2,000 sign-ups; #1 SEO for target keywords (above corporate site).

zh: 購物車轉換率 22%→57%（+159%），整合 YouTube 直播一站式銷售。
en: Cart conversion 22%→57% (+159%); integrated YouTube live into a one-stop sales flow.

name.zh: AI 影音內容生成工具（SaaS）

zh: 規劃「人格模型→腳本→字幕→短影音」全鏈路自動化，整合 LLM / TTS / FFmpeg；單支短影音成本降 90%，生產週期從數天縮短至數分鐘。
en: Designed an end-to-end pipeline (persona → script → subtitles → short video) integrating LLM / TTS / FFmpeg; cut per-video cost by 90% and shortened the production cycle from days to minutes.

name.zh: AI 數據分析決策工具（SaaS）

zh: 將 SQL 查詢產品化為 NLP 查詢介面，AI 自動摘要把決策路徑縮短 60%，降低非技術人員使用門檻。
en: Productized SQL queries into an NLP interface; AI auto-summaries cut the decision path by 60%, lowering the barrier for non-technical users.

zh: 帶 4 人團隊 2 個月概念到上線，定義遊戲化留存指標；Demo Day 獲『像玩遊戲一樣上癮』高評價。
en: Led a 4-person team from concept to launch in 2 months; defined gamification retention metrics; praised as 'addictive like a game' at Demo Day.

zh: Next.js 多語系 + 動畫 + SEO，盲盒玩偶概念敘事；於海外招募流程獲面試邀約。
en: Next.js multilingual site with animation and SEO, framed as a blind-box concept; landed an interview in an overseas recruiting process.

degree.zh: 電影學系 學士｜全系排名第 1（162 學分）；修習 UI/UX 與前端開發課程；多益金色證書（860）
degree.en: B.A. in Film | Ranked #1 in department (162 credits); UI/UX & front-end coursework; TOEIC Gold (860)
